items.name: Reversible Shearling Liner Jacket
items.description: Designed for versatile length that hits at the hip, this liner jacket is finely crafted with plush sheep shearling. It features a paneled construction and reversible silhouette that delivers two looks in one.

items.name: The Gorham Down Jacket
items.description: Made from water-repellent ripstop fabric, this jacket is insulated with 650-fill-power down and constructed with a detachable hood.

items.name: The RL67 Herringbone Jacket
items.description: Created to mark the 50th anniversary of Ralph Lauren, the RL67 jacket draws inspiration from a herringbone sport coat that has been a treasured part of Mr. Lauren’s wardrobe since 1971. This reinterpretation is crafted in Italy with a black-and-white wool tweed that was custom-developed with Ireland’s Magee 1866 mill, which has been a Ralph Lauren partner for over 50 years.
